query: SELECT 'pedidos' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM pedidos UNION ALL SELECT 'produtos', COUNT(*) FROM produtos UNION ALL SELECT 'webhook_logs', COUNT(*) FROM webhook_logs;
